metadata.name: Home screen
metadata.description: Verifies the top page: hero + featured collection + platform collection + 6-tab TabView + language toggle. Every assertion traces back to a section of home.spec.json.

cases.name: initial_display
cases.description: On load the hero, featured collection (3 cards), platform collection (3 cards), and all 6 TabView tabs render. Default tab index = 0 (Learn), so the Learn placeholder is visible and the other placeholders are not. Traces to structure.tabView, stateManagement.uiVariables (featuredLinks, platformCards, currentLanguage), and notes (featuredLinks count = 3, platformCards count = 3).

cases.name: featured_and_platform_card_counts
cases.description: The two Collections render exactly 3 cells each per the spec notes (featuredLinks count = 3, platformCards count = 3). Cells inherit their parent Collection id on mount, so we assert on the parent container's rendered child count via Playwright's id-plus-child selector. Since the test runner only supports count assertions against a single id, we assert via the visible-root count for each collection's direct children cards by using cell header labels (StringManager-resolved titles inside each card).

cases.name: tap_hero_get_started_navigates_away
cases.description: Tapping the primary hero CTA invokes onHeroGetStartedTap which calls navigate('/learn/hello-world'). After navigation the Home tree unmounts, so home_root is no longer visible. Traces to userActions[0] (Tap hero CTA) and the VM's initializeEventHandlers mapping onHeroGetStartedTap -> /learn/hello-world.

cases.name: tap_hero_showcase_navigates_to_platforms
cases.description: Tapping the tertiary hero CTA (Cross-platform showcase) invokes onHeroShowcaseTap which calls navigate('/platforms'). Used here in place of a per-card tap on the Swift/Kotlin/React platform cells because the generator does not currently emit a stable per-cell HTML id (follow-up noted). Still traces to the same spec transition: onNavigate(url) -> platforms section.

cases.name: tap_language_toggle_flips_en_to_ja
cases.description: Default language is 'en'. Tapping the language toggle invokes onToggleLanguage, which flips StringManager to 'ja' and re-seeds onAppear -> currentLanguage becomes 'ja'. We assert the language sentinel label's text flips from 'en' to 'ja', and that the hero title text switches from the English to the Japanese copy. Traces to stateManagement.eventHandlers.onToggleLanguage and the currentLanguage uiVariable.

cases.name: tap_reference_tab_shows_reference_placeholder
cases.description: Tapping the Reference tab (index 2: Learn=0, Guides=1, Reference=2) invokes setSelectedTabIndex(2) on the VM. The Home component swaps the rendered tab content, so reference_placeholder becomes visible and learn_placeholder disappears. Traces to structure.tabView.tabs[2] and userActions[4] (Switch tab).
